name: Guess the Emojis
author: Poki
description: Guess the Emojis is a puzzle game where you match the right emojis to complete the text! Think outside the box, use your emoji knowledge, and solve each puzzle with creativity. It’s a test of how well you know your emojis. Can you guess them all correctly? There is now a special level pack in Guess the Emoij featuring all your favorite Italian Brainrot Characters. We are talking about Ballerina Cappuccina, Tung Tung Sahure, Brr Brr Patapim, Tralalero Tralala and many more! How to play Guess the Emojis? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Guess the Emojis? Guess the Emojis is created by Playrea. Play their other games on Poki: Pocket Zoo ! How can I play Guess the Emojis for free? You can play Guess the Emojis for free on Poki. Can I play Guess the Emojis on mobile devices and desktop? Guess the Emojis can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
